Course closed for this cycle: Land Economy Research is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
Sep. 3, 2025
Application deadline
Jan. 27, 2026
These deadlines apply to applications for courses starting in Michaelmas 2026, Lent 2027 and Easter 2027.
matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Land Economy Research is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: This course combines taught elements and research methods training with a significant level of independent research. Students admitted to this course will be those who have a strong background in land economy-related subjects and who may already have some research experience. They will normally be those aspiring to and who have good prospects of proceeding to the PhD prior to an academic career.
